text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking by the front gate of the academy, I
spot Air Groove and Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oho, looks like this party has a new guest! Come
join us!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Who said you could invite anyone?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She's been moaning all day about how bored she
is without the president around.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I attempted to remove her from the premises, but
she ended up dragging me out here with her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, just give it up and hang out with me
already! Let's goooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
H-hold on, I didn't agree to any of this! Let go of
me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And here we are! All right, Air Groove. Time to
duke it out!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Fine. Just one round, and then I'll be going.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I know. Your trainer can decide what we
play! How about it?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You prob'ly don't play games like this a lot, so it's
fairer if I let you guys choose!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hah. As if I need any favors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What game should I pick?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! You sure? I'm pretty good at those, if I do
say so myself!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I won't back down in the face of a challenge.
Bring it, Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe, gotcha. I'm not holdin' back then!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Woohoo, a perfect score on the bonus stage too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio's footwork is incredible...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heh, how do ya like that, Air Groove? No way you can beat that score!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh, wait... Where's Air Groove? Is she still
playing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was so absorbed in Tokai Teio's dancing that I
forgot about Air Groove. I frantically look for her
and find...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter with you?! Where are your
manners?!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Don't be like that, gorgeous! Your dancing just
looked so great, I couldn't stop staring!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
You gotta show us those hot moves again. I'll
even pay for it! It's what you came here for, right?
What's the problem?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I instinctively move to get between them.
However, before I'm able to reach Air Groove,
someone else leaps to action.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Get! Away! From! Her!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong with you two?! Don't you know
better than to bother people who're just trying to
have fun?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Besides, it's me you should be watching, not her! I put on a way better show!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
C-come on, dude, let's bail... Short stack's totally
killed the mood.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: You said it. See ya later, pipsqueak!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
H-hold it! Who're you callin' pipsqueak?! Talk
about rude!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Grrr... And don't get me started on you, Air
Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What did I do?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's what you didn't do that's the problem! Where was the scary Air Groove who always yells at me?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Just today, you were giving me that look of yours with your eyebrow raised all the way to here!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
They're complete strangers. I can't treat them the
same way I treat you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That shouldn't matter! Ugh, why don't you get it?!
Sheesh!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hold on... Are you... telling me off right now?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Am I actually being told off by Teio? Talk about
ridiculous... Haha... Ahahah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Come ON! First them, now you? Stop laughing
when I'm trying to be serious!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry, it's just... Pfft... I really can't...
Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove can't help but laugh at the bizarre
predicament she's found herself in.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, a game of knowledge and stratagems. Yes, I
think this might be fun.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Heh, well... I'm no pushover when it comes to
games that use your brains!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Before we begin, I'd like to study the
features and abilities of the cards. Wait just a
moment, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Take as long as you need! Imma go try the claw
machine in the meantime.
choice_data_list: Don't you need to get ready too?
Don't you need to get ready too?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I've played this game loads of times. I've just
about memorized all the cards.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: No point gettin' all worked up about it!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That should be enough. Thank you for waiting,
Teio. I'm ready now.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I scored twenty pieces of candy while waiting, so
it's all good.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All righty then! Let's get this game started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The duel begins, and Tokai Teio quickly gains the
upper hand.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Heh, drawing this out isn't fun for anyone. It's
time to end this!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oho... You have both the knowledge and daring
to strike when necessary. I imagine the average
player wouldn't stand a chance against you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Haha, here's somethin' you don't see every day! Is
the high and mighty Air Groove givin' up?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No, Teio. I said the average player.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I certainly hope you're not counting the Empress
among their ranks!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now, prepare to feel my army's wrath!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Zhwooooom!)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: N-nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I... I lost?! But how?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hubris got the best of you. You believed you had
an advantage over your opponent in experience,
expertise, and even innate ability.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This combination was the source of your
carelessness—and by extension, your defeat.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Careless? Me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...I'm gonna review all the cards again. You'd
better sit tight, 'cause we're having a rematch!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You may be the Empress, but I'm the Monarch!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I refuse to accept anything other than a clean
sweep!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Very well. I'll humor you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmph, just you wait!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...For once, I agree.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, much to her enjoyment, Air Groove
spends a little more time matching wits against
Tokai Teio.
